author: śrīmadbhaktivedānta trivikrama gosvāmī mahārāja
verses:
namaḥ oṁ viṣṇu⋅pādāya
ācārya⋅siṁha⋅rūpiṇe
śrī⋅śrīmad⋅bhakti⋅prajñāna⋅
keśava⋅iti⋅nāmine

śrī⋅sarasvatyabhīpsitaṁ
sarvathā suṣṭhu⋅pāline
śrī⋅sarasvatyabhinnāya
patitoddhāra⋅kāriṇe

vajrādapi kaṭhorāya
ca⋅apasiddhānta⋅nāśine
satyasyārthe nirbhīkāya
kusaṅga⋅parihāriṇe

atimartya⋅caritrāya
svāśritānāñca⋅pāline
jīva⋅duḥkhe sadārtāya
śrī⋅nāma⋅prema⋅dāyine

viṣṇu⋅pāda⋅prakāśāya
kṛṣṇa⋅kāmaika⋅cāriṇe
gaura⋅cintā⋅nimagnāya
śrī⋅guruṁ hṛdi⋅dhāriṇe

viśvaṁ viṣṇu⋅mayamiti
snigdha⋅darśana⋅śāline
namaste guru⋅devāya
kṛṣṇa⋅vaibhava⋅rūpiṇe

śrī⋅śrī⋅gauḍīya⋅vedānta⋅
samiteḥ sthāpakāya ca
śrī⋅śrī⋅māyāpura⋅dhāmnaḥ
sevā⋅samṛddhi⋅kāriṇe

navadvīpa⋅parikramā
jenaiva rakṣitā sadā
dīnaṁ prati dayālave
tasmai śrī⋅gurave namaḥ

dehi me tava śaktistu
dīneneyaṁ suyācitā
tava pāda⋅sarojebhyo
matirastu pradhāvitā
en_translation:
I offer my obeisances unto Viṣṇupāda Śrī Śrīmad Bhakti Prajñāna Keśava Gosvāmī, who is like a lion among the ācāryas.

He perfectly fulfills the desire of Śrī Sarasvatī in every way; he is non-different from Śrī Sarasvatī and is the deliverer of the fallen.

He is harder than a thunderbolt in destroying conclusions opposed to bhakti; he is fearless for the sake of truth and causes one to reject bad association.

His character is superhuman, and he protects those who take shelter of him; he is always distressed by the suffering of the jīvas and bestows love for the Holy Name.

He is the manifestation of Viṣṇupāda, and his only desire is to serve Kṛṣṇa; he is immersed in thoughts of Gaura and holds Śrī Guru in his heart.

He possesses affectionate vision, seeing the whole universe as pervaded by Viṣṇu; I offer obeisances to you, Gurudeva, who are the embodiment of Kṛṣṇa's opulence.

He is the founder of the Śrī Gauḍīya Vedānta Samiti and the one who brought about the prosperity of service in Śrī Māyāpura Dhāma.

He always protected the Navadvīpa Parikramā; I offer my obeisances to that Śrī Guru who is merciful to the fallen.

Please give me your strength; this is the earnest prayer of this fallen soul. May my mind run rapidly toward your lotus feet.
